description: Acknowledgment of a debt of 10 dinars contracted by Ḥammūd b. Hāshim, the miller, with Ibrāhīm b. Ḥajīj, the Jewish middleman. The document states that Ḥammūd will pay back 2 dinars on Rajab of the year 420 AH (= 1029 CE), and the remaining sum in monthly instalments of 1 dinar each, starting from Shaʿbān of the same year. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
